name: nyaya-ai-workspace
description: Root orchestrator for Nyaya AI Next.js Frontend and FastAPI Backend

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n " NYAYA-OS , FASTAPI " "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules frontend/.next backend/venv && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -r {} + 2>/dev/null || true
